characters.name: Characters
characters.description: This page contains a list of characters featured inHome and Away. Here you can see the current cast of Home and Away as of 2023. Here you can find past characters in alphabetical order. (Note: This list is not extensive!) Here you can see the current cast of Home and Away as of 2023.
characters.personality_section: Here you can see the current cast of Home and Away as of 2023.

characters.name: Ailsa Hogan
characters.description: Ailsa "Ailse" Stewart (nee O'Rourke, also Hogan)was the second wife ofAlf Stewartand the mother ofDuncan StewartandShauna Bradley. She's the stepmother of Alf's daughters,Roo Stewartand Quinn Jackson and aunt of Troy, Justin andEmma Jackson. She's also the grandmother of Duncan's son,Bryce Stewart.

characters.name: Ailsa Hogan

characters.name: Alan Ellis
characters.description: Jackie Ellis (wife) Alan Ellisis the father ofElizabeth Elliswho passed away from arrhythmia and the husband ofJackie Ellis. The character is portrayed byBlair McDonoughonHome and Away. Alan is spending time with his daughterBeth ElliswhenMason Morganapproaches them and introduces himself as Beth's boyfriend. Beth apologises to her father for the way he found out about her relationship. Alan invites Mason to brunch and they are joined by his wife Jackie. After brunch, Alan tells Mason to stay away from Beth. He later comes to Mason's home, where Beth confronts him about what he said. Mason tells Alan that they both want Beth to be happy, and they sit down and talk. Beth is later rushed to the hospital, and Alan tells Mason to stay away. When Beth wakes up, she asks her parents to let Mason see her. Jackie convinces Alan to give them some time alone together. The Ellis' are later informed that Beth's heart is failing and she is now top of the transplant list. When Beth's heart stops, Alan blames Mason for taking her out. Beth dies shortly after of a sudden fatal arrhythmia andToritells Alan and Jackie that it could have happened anytime. They later make a complaint against Mason for acting inappropriately.

characters.name: Alf Stewart
characters.description: Alfred "Alf" James Stewartis the longest serving character ofHome and Away,having appeared continuously since 1988. He is the father to his four children,Roo Stewart,Duncan Stewart, Owen Dalby andQuinn Jackson. He's also the stepfather ofShauna Bradley; the husband ofMartha Stewart; the widower ofAilsa Hogan; and the grandfather toMartha MacKenzie,Bryce Stewart,Ric DalbyandRyder Jackson. In his early years, Alf was described as a "good-natured rogue with a finger in every pie" He was born inSummer Bayand lived with his parents Gordon and Sarah-Jane Stewart. Alf is commonly known for his use of declining Australian slang with sayings such as "strewth", "stone the flamin' crows", "flamin' mongrels", "flamin' gallah", "flamin' heck", "give me strength", "only bar in Riga" "strike me pink" "Hogan's ghost", "fair crack of the whip", "tucker" and "yarn" CharactersRic Dalby(who now lives interstate), andMartha MacKenzieare his grandchildren, and after a large look at the history of the family,Colleen Smartwas found to be his half-sister.

characters.name: Amanda Vale
characters.description: Amanda Baker (also Vale & Walters)is the biological mother ofBelle TaylorandRyan Baker. She's also the wife   -of -,Peter Bakerand the ex-wife Peter's brother,Dan Baker. She's the former wife of Graham Walters, and stepmother of Graham's daughter,Bethand ex-mistress to Peter's son,Drew Curtis. When Amanda was a teenager, she became pregnant with her first child. However, Amanda's mother, Kitty Lansdowne believes that Amanda isn't ready to become a mother and decided to give Amanda's baby away for adoption, without Amanda's permission and lied to Amanda that her baby died, leaving Amanda devastated. She later marriedDan Bakerand together they had a son named Ryan. However their marriage fell apart and Dan moves to Summer Bay and is engaged toLeah Patterson-Baker.

characters.name: Amber 'Rabbit' Copeland
characters.description: Rabbitappeared visible only to Miles and he tried hard to convince that she was real and not just a figment of his imagination. After some therapy she dissapearred she now is a home and away character and works in the school hoping to be a nurse.

characters.name: Angelo Rosetta
characters.description: Angelo Rosettais the son of Carla Rosetta and the brother of Paulie Rosetta. He's the killer ofJack Holdenand the ex-boyfriend ofBelle TaylorandCharlie Buckton. He's also the ex-boyfriend ofNicole Franklinand former stepfather to her son, George Franklin. He's the husband ofTaylor Rosetta. Angelo replacesJack Holdenat Yabbie Creek Police Station  when he takes time off to deal with his wife,Martha MacKenziecancer diagnosis. He flirts withCharlie Bucktonon an assignment and asks her out but she rejects him. He then turns his attention toBelle Taylorwho refuses at first but only goes out with Angelo to make her ex-boyfriendAden Jefferiesjealous. When Belle is held hostage by Aden, Angelo rescues her. They form a friendship which develops into something more.

characters.name: Annie Campbell
characters.description: Annie Campbellis the daughter of Jim and Tania Campbell. She's the granddaughter of Bruce Campbell and the younger sister ofGeoff Campbell. She's also the ex-girlfriend of ,Dexter WalkerandRomeo Smithand the best friend ofBelle Taylor. When Annie and her brother,Geoff wereyoung, their parents Jim and Tania died, and Annie and Geoff moved a farm to live with their grandfather, Bruce, a strict religious man.

characters.name: Ava Gilbert
characters.description: Ava Gilbert-Leeis the daughter ofJustin MorganandNina Gilbert. She's the niece ofTori Morgan,Brody Morgan,Mason MorganandRaffy Morrisonand a older cousin to Grace Morgan-Shaw . She's also the granddaughter of Justin's deceased parents, Koby and Kate Lee. She lives in a house in the city with her mother. Ava was born to Jack Lee (Justin) and Nina Gilbert, when her parents were in a relationship. But when Justin and his family were in danger, they went under witness protection and Justin had no choice, but to leave Nina to raise their daughter on her own. In order to keep Ava safe, Justin had leave Ava until the witness protection is over. Justin and his siblings moved out and move to Summer Bay. Ava hasn't seen her father in seven years. But during under protection, Justin kept an old video of him playing with baby Ava.  Hello While Ava is walking home from school with her friend, she notices Justin leaving his cap behind on a bench and returns it to him. Justin realises that she is his daughter when she enters Nina's house. Weeks later, Ava turns up at Justin's house, having left the city on a bus. She asks Justin if he is her father and he confirms that he is.

characters.name: Axel Boyd
characters.description: Axel Boydis a character inHome and Away,portrayed by Matthew Pearce, he made his first appearance on the 6th November. Axel meetsOlivia Fraser Richardsat Salt, after she complains that her dresses are being sold on his fashion website. He apologises and explains that when he learned that a low level designer copied her designs, they were fired. He then offers Olivia a deal to buy one of her designs. When Olivia meets with him again to discuss the contract, Axel invites her to the company headquarters in Melbourne. After the trip, Olivia meets with Axel to show him some new designs. She introduces him to her boyfriendHunter King, who attempts to ask questions about the contract, but Olivia shuts him down. Axel later tells Olivia that he thinks Hunter will hold her back. When Axel arranges a photoshoot and interview for Olivia at Salt, he suggests that Hunter leaves, as he is a distraction. Axel flatters Olivia over drinks and then kisses her. Olivia makes it clear that she is in a relationship with Hunter and that their relationship should stay as a business relationship.

characters.name: Belle Taylor
characters.description: Belle Jefferies (nee Taylor)is the long lost daughter ofAmanda Vale. She's the adoptive daughter of David and Judith Taylor and the half-sister of Ryan Baker. She's also the stepdaughter of, Graham Phillips andPeter Baker. She's the granddaughter of Kitty Landsdowne and the niece of Kelli Vale. She's the stepsister of Graham's daughter, Beth Hunter and Peter's son,Drew Curtis, who is also her ex-boyfriend. She's also the wife ofAden Jefferies.

He is alsoDiana's son-in-law andBrody Morgan's former father-in-law. He is the estranged brother ofMarco Astoni.

characters.name: Beth Ellis
characters.description: Elizabeth 'Beth' Elliswas the daughterAlan EllisandJackie Ellis. She was alsoMason Morgan's love interest and girlfriend until her death. Beth is cheeky, layered and she wants to make the people around her feel good. She is mysterious, perhaps even a bit quirky. While she is at the hospital, Beth overhears Mason Morgan shouting at his siblings about his paralysis. She later changes into some nursing scrubs and attempts to cheer Mason up. Beth convinces him to get in the wheelchair and they race around the corridors. Mason meets Beth again and they spend some more time together. It emerges Beth is a patient when she returns to her room to continue her treatment. Beth and Mason spend more time together, and he introduces her to his sisterTori Morgan. Beth keeps up the pretence that she is a nurse, but Mason later finds her in her room undergoing a procedure. He attempts to look at her file and Beth catches him. She tells Mason that she has cardiomyopathy and is waiting for a heart transplant. Beth explains that she liked pretending to be someone else, as she did not want Mason to pity her. They agree to start their friendship over. Beth encourages Mason to forgive his brotherBrody Morganfor causing the crash that paralysed him. Mason finds Beth's bucket list and arranges for them to get tattoos together. Beth is cheeky, layered and she wants to make the people around her feel good. She is mysterious, perhaps even a bit quirky.
characters.personality_section: Beth is cheeky, layered and she wants to make the people around her feel good. She is mysterious, perhaps even a bit quirky.

characters.name: Bianca Scott
characters.description: Bianca Scottis the former school principal ofSummer Bayand the older daughter ofJoanna Scott. She's the older half-sister ofApril ScottandCharlie Buckton's   best friend. She's also the ex-girlfriend ofAdam Sharpeand the ex-fiancee of Prince Vittoro Seca. She's the ex-wife ofLiam Murphyand the wife ofHeath Braxton. She's the mother of Heath's sonRocco Scott-Braxtonand the stepmother of Heath's children,Darcy CallahanandHarley Lockwood-Braxton. She's also the closest friend ofIrene Roberts.

characters.name: Billie Ashford
characters.description: Leah Patterson-baker(mother-in-law)  Vinnie patterson (father-in-law) dan baker step father in law deceased  ryan baker step brother in law Belinda "Billie" Patterson (née Ashford)was the younger sister ofMartin Ashfordand patrick  stanwood . She'sDean Sanderson's ex-girlfriend andVJ Patterson's wife. She's alsoMick Jennings's rape victim and the mother of his child,Luc Patterson. While attending the grave of her brother Luke on Anzac Day, Billie is reunited with their older brother, Ash.[9]She attempts to drive off, but Ash stops her and they place flowers on Luke's grave together.

characters.name: Blake Dean
characters.description: Blake Deanis the son of Les Bagley and Margot Dean and the brother ofKaren Dean. He's also the half-brother ofRoxy Millerand the nephew of Kevin Bagley and Alec Dean. He's the husband ofSophie Simpsonand the ex-boyfriend of Rachel Webb andFinlay Roberts. He also was the boyfriend ofMeg Bowmanuntil her death. He's the father of David Simpson and the stepfather of Sophie's daughter, Tamara Simpson. Blake arrives in Summer Bay with his younger sister Karen, looking forAilsa Hogan, who had been in prison with their mother, Margot, who has recently died. They hope Ailsa will take them in after living with their uncle Alec proved to be unpleasant. Ailsa's husband Alf is less than enthusiastic but she eventually talks him round.

characters.name: Boyd Easton
characters.description: Boyd Eastonis a minor character inHome and Away,portrayed by Steve Le Marquand who made his first appearance on the 16 November 2017. Boyd comes toWillow Harris's home and demands his money back. Willow admits that she does not have it, but will get it to him soon. They are interrupted byJustin Morgan, who tells Boyd that he found his money and gave it to the police. Boyd tells Willow to get him the money and he leaves. Boyd later shows up at Justin's house looking for Willow, and he gives them 24 hours to give him his money.

He is named as a tribute to his uncle, the younger half-brother of Darryl,Casey Braxton.

characters.name: Cassie Turner
characters.description: Cassandra "Cassie" Turneris the foster daughter ofSally FletcherandFlynn Saunders. She's the ex-girlfriend ofRic Dalbyand Michael MacKenzie and the best friend ofMatilda Hunter. She's also the ex-fiance of Henk Van Minnen and the mother of Summer Rose Turner. Cassie meets Ric while jet-skiing, it soon becomes clear she stole the vehicle and they escape the owner. She meets Ric once again and they go skinny dipping at the beach. Cassie steals his clothes and forces him to go home naked. Cassie attends the "Miss Groper" pageant where her grandmother, Joy is taking part. When she does not win, she gets into an argument with Colleen Smart (Lyn Collingwood), collapses and later dies.

characters.name: Charlie Buckton
characters.description: Charlotte "Charlie" Bucktonwas the daughter of the late Ross Buckton and Elsie Buckton. She was also the stepdaughter ofMorag Bellinghamand the mother ofRuby Buckton. She was the ex-girlfriend ofGrant Beldcoe,Roman Harris,Angelo Rosetta,Joey Collins. And James Braxton She was the best friend ofBianca ScottandLeah Patterson-Baker. and the girlfriend of darryl braxton When Charlie was 14, she was raped by her 15-year old abusive teenage boyfriend,Grant Beldcoeand she got pregnant with his daughter, Ruby.

characters.name: Charlotte Best
characters.description: Charlotte Best (born January 16th 1994) is an Australian actress. She is best known for portrayingAnnie Campbellalongside her onscreen brother,Geoff(Lincoln Lewis), a role she has played from 2007 - 2009. Charlotte initially attended Central Coast Grammar School before going on to study at Brent Street performing arts school alongside her co-starJordan Rodrigues(Jai Fernandez), before she landed her role on Home and Away. She had also appeared regularly in a series of magazines such as "Total Girl" and "Barbie Magazine", as a model in 2006/2007.

characters.name: Charlotte King
characters.description: Charlotte Kingwas a former teacher ofSummer Bay Highand the ex-girlfriend ofWally Burns,Zac MacGuire,Andy BarrettandKyle Braxton. She had an affair with her student,Matt Pageand the mother of Wally's son,Hunter King. She's also the killer ofDenny Millerand Trystan Powell. Charlotte was born and raised by her parents, Ernest and Peggy King and her family was close toWally Burns, their next door neighbour.
